General.Name: Wai Chun Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Wai Chun Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the sale and service, and provision of integration services of computer and communication systems in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company operates through Sales and Integration Services, and General Trading segments. It also involved in the design, consultation, and production of information system software; and the provision of management training services. In addition, the company engages in the provision of network and system integration of software solutions; and trading chemicals. The company was formerly known as Wai Chun Group Limited and changed its name to Wai Chun Group Holdings Limited in November 2008. Wai Chun Group Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1996 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Wai Chun Group Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Ka Chun Holdings Limited.
General.Address: China Resources Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
